meta.title: A Method for Assessing the Size of a Protein from its Composition: its Use in Evaluating Data on the Size of the Protein Subunits of Plant Virus Particles

abstractHtml: A method is described for assessing the possible size of a protein from its amino acid composition. This method is then used to re-examine published data and to estimate the sizes of the proteins in the particles of various plants viruses. Some of the results obtained agree with the published reports, others do not.
